title: Brand Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Mehrjährige Erfahrung im Marketing (inhouse / Agentur / projektbasiert)
matched_skills: AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) — explicitly listed as requirement, exact match
Content creation & channel management (HSBC newsletters, IPC multi-format content)
KOL / influencer management (Moli Media — outreach, briefings, on-event coordination)
Community engagement & audience analytics (Moli Media post-event ROI analysis)
Cross-functional content coordination (GRG, IPC — aligned sales+marketing messaging)
missing_skills: Dedicated social media / shortform video creation experience — not in CV
Platform-specific mechanics (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) — not evidenced
No-code automation tools (e.g. Zapier, Make) — not mentioned
core_responsibilities: Social-Media-Aktivitäten planen und umsetzen (Shortform Video, Posts, Carousels, Stories)
Content für Releases, Produkt-Updates, Features und Partner-Themen produzieren und veröffentlichen
Community Management: Kommentare, DMs, Feedback — Impulse zurück ins Team spiegeln
Newsletter, Website-Updates, Launch-Assets und erste Paid-Tests unterstützen
KPIs definieren, Ergebnisse auswerten, Learnings in nächste Iteration einfließen lassen
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: newsletter writing + promotional video production — maps directly to content production and publishing
Moli Media: KOL outreach, briefings, scheduling — maps to Creator-Kooperationen
AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) — explicitly required; call out daily usage for copy, research, prompting routines
Moli Media: audience analytics + engagement reporting — maps to KPI evaluation and learnings
MSc PR & Advertising (Shih Hsin Univ.) — directly relevant academic background
